shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && (test -f package.json && cat package.json) || echo 'no package.json'
cd /home/user/workspace && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
cd /home/user/workspace && sed -n '1,120p' AGENTS.md && printf '\n---README---\n' && sed -n '1,120p' README.md
